_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of autophagy as a novel treatment for neurofibromatosis type 1 tumors.

_contextSnippet: CQ and selumetinib treatment were found to have no toxicity effects in these mice...treatment with CQ...resulted in a significant reduction in tumor cell growth over a period of 3 weeks
details: CQ treatment showed no toxicity effects and resulted in significant tumor growth reduction in ST88-14 NF1-/- xenograft model
